description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a mix of dark and wood-textured exterior panels. Large floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the front and side facades, allowing for ample natural light and clear views into the interior living spaces. The structure is two stories tall, with the upper level slightly offset, creating interesting geometric lines and overhangs. The rear and one side of the house are clad in a wood-like material, while the other sides are finished in a dark, likely composite or metal paneling. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some rooms featuring expansive glass and others with smaller, more private openings. The main entryway is recessed under a cantilevered section, providing shelter and a visually striking entrance.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a mix of dark and wood-textured exterior panels. The design features geometric lines, asymmetrical window placement, and a recessed main entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows on both floors, dark paneling, and a glimpse of interior furnishings.
description_view_1: Side view with a mix of white and wood-textured panels, multiple windows, and the recessed main entryway beneath a cantilevered section.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by wood-textured cladding, smaller windows, and a flat roof profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with dark paneling, fewer windows, and a more private facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry under a cantilevered section, no visible steps, minimalistic modern door
